document.title: 附錄二 受測裝置之測試照片

sourceSummary.oneLine: Appendix 2 contains test photographs for SAMSUNG model WBW880A under case C1M1902181 and report EM-NC190051.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents test setup photographs for power conducted disturbance voltage, radiated measurement below and above 1GHz, and RF Conducted measurement.
keyPoints: 案件編號:C1M1902181 and 報告號碼:EM-NC190051 are repeated across the appendix pages.
The tested device is identified as 廠牌：SAMSUNG, 型號：WBW880A.
Test photo sections include 電源傳導干擾電壓之配置照片, 輻射量測之配置照片, and RF Conducted 量測.
